## Title: Fix signedness bug in NFAPI shared PA parameter serialization

### Summary
The NFAPI PNF parameter general TLV incorrectly serializes the `shared_pa` field using unsigned 8-bit packing functions (`push8`/`pull8`). This field represents a power adjustment value that can be negative, and using unsigned serialization corrupts negative values during message packing/unpacking. The bug manifests when the PHY attempts to apply power control adjustments, resulting in incorrect transmit power l
